title: Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for June 17, 2021 web conference - Canada.ca
content:
## Science Advisory Committee on Health Products Containing Cannabis (SAC-HPCC): Agenda for June 17, 2021 web conference

## Thursday, June 17, 2021 11:50 am to 2:00 pm Eastern Time (ET)
Purpose: This web conference will focus on requirements for clinical trials involving cannabis. It will include presentations from Health Canada on the current requirements for conducting cannabis research and clinical trials involving cannabis. These presentations will be followed by a discussion on the challenges within the research community relevant to the committee mandate.
Agenda June 17, 2021
Welcome and introductory remarks Presenters: Ed Morgan, Director General of the Policy Planning and International Affairs Directorate (PPIAD) and Manon Bombardier, Acting Associate Assistant Deputy Minister of the Health Products and Food Branch
